rows.definition: The full drive record for one served run (run-state, budget, priority, pace), keyed by TraceID and persisting across turns.
rows.distinction: The persistent RECORD across turns - NOT a Turn (one round-trip within it) and NOT a Slot (the free/busy signal).

rows.definition: One model round-trip within a session: the agent submits input, the model generates output, and results are admitted to context.
rows.distinction: ONE round-trip - NOT a Session (which spans many turns) and NOT a Slot (the scheduling event at a turn boundary).

rows.definition: The immutable free/busy signal emitted when a session leaves the eligible set (budget exhaustion, pause, drain, stop), freeing scheduling capacity.
rows.distinction: The free/busy SIGNAL at turn boundaries - NOT the Session (persistent state) and NOT the Budget (the allotment whose exhaustion fires it).

rows.definition: The policy layer that reads a Table's Snapshot and selects the live session that should run next (StrictPriority or WeightedFair).
rows.distinction: The POLICY that picks a winner - NOT the Table (the mutable store) and NOT a Session (one state record).

rows.definition: A session's remaining work allotment across three independent axes: turns (round-trips), output tokens, and context tokens.
rows.distinction: TOTAL remaining work - NOT Pace (the per-turn throttle) and NOT a Slot (the signal fired when budget is exhausted).
gaps: budget/pace/runstate are defined-only, not yet in the glossary

rows.definition: The per-turn throttle: max output tokens and minimum gap between turns, applied cooperatively without pausing the session.
rows.distinction: PER-TURN throttle (how hard one turn runs) - NOT Budget (total remaining work across all turns).
gaps: budget/pace/runstate are defined-only, not yet in the glossary

rows.definition: A served session's lifecycle position in a small total state machine: Running, Throttled, Paused, Draining, or Stopped.
rows.distinction: ONE field carrying the session's phase - NOT the Session (the full record that contains it).
gaps: budget/pace/runstate are defined-only, not yet in the glossary

rows.definition: Live, mutable per-session control record: run-state, budget, priority, pace, and revision (an optimistic-concurrency guard).
rows.distinction: The LIVE mutable drive record - NOT sessionimage.Image (the persisted on-disk archive) and NOT SessionPlanner (the context-planner state).

rows.definition: Loaded, integrity-verified portable session archive: drive (session.json), recall manifest, ctxplan index, trajectory corpus, and image.json meta.
rows.distinction: The PERSISTED portable archive - NOT session.State (the live drive record) and NOT recall (one component bundled inside the image).
gaps: sessionimage.Image (persisted archive) vs session.State (live) is defined-only

rows.definition: Persistent per-session context planner: a long-lived lossless store plus candidate index that ingests each turn's new messages incrementally.
rows.distinction: The STATEFUL per-session planner - NOT CtxViewPlanner (the stateless shared seam) and NOT session.State (the drive record).

rows.definition: The stable identity key for a session (its TraceID), constant across all of the session's turns.
rows.distinction: The session IDENTITY - NOT a Turn (one round-trip within it) and NOT the Session record it keys.
gaps: SessionID (identity) vs the Session record is defined-only

rows.definition: The constructor that admits a fresh session into the table with its initial drive state.
rows.distinction: The session CONSTRUCTOR - NOT session.State (the record it builds) and NOT the Session concept itself.
gaps: NewSession (constructor) vs session.State (the record) is defined-only

rows.definition: One accounted served round-trip bound to a session: the begin / debit / served lifecycle of a single turn.
rows.distinction: One served TURN's accounting record - NOT Turn (the abstract round-trip concept) and NOT session.State (the persistent record).
gaps: SessionTurn (accounted round-trip) vs Turn (the concept) is defined-only

rows.definition: Per-session token and cost accounting rolled up across the session's turns.
rows.distinction: The session ACCOUNTING rollup - NOT Budget (the ceiling it counts against) and NOT a single SessionTurn debit.
gaps: SessionUsage (rollup) vs Budget (the ceiling) is defined-only

rows.definition: An external steer directive against a live session: pause / resume / priority / pace change.
rows.distinction: The external STEER directive - NOT session.State (the record it mutates) and NOT the Scheduler (which reads the result).
gaps: SessionControlRequest (steer) vs session.State (the record) is defined-only

rows.definition: A directive to clear a session's drive state back to a clean baseline without removing it from the pool.
rows.distinction: The RESET directive - NOT eviction from the pool and NOT session.State itself.
gaps: SessionReset (clear state) vs eviction is defined-only

rows.definition: The read query that returns a snapshot of all live sessions in the table.
rows.distinction: The READ snapshot query - NOT the Scheduler (which picks one to run) and NOT the Session record itself.
gaps: ListSessions (read snapshot) vs Scheduler (the picker) is defined-only
